The oxygen atom (O:42) is bonded to only one carbon atom (C:41), which appears to be part of a carbonyl or similar functional group structure.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 42 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
